subject: Q3 Product Roadmap — Final Review
snippet: Hi team, I've finalized the Q3 roadmap doc. Key highlights: shipping the new onboarding flow in July, analytics dashboard in August...
body:
Hi team,

I've finalized the Q3 roadmap doc. Key highlights:

- Shipping the new onboarding flow in July
- Analytics dashboard in August
- Mobile app refresh in September

Please review and leave comments by EOD Friday. I'll incorporate all feedback before the all-hands on Monday.

Drive link: https://docs.google.com/document/d/roadmap-q3

Thanks,
Sarah

subject: [agent-native/core] PR #847: Add keyboard navigation support
snippet: mikejohnson opened a pull request. Changes: +342 -18 lines. Adds full keyboard navigation to email list, thread view, and compose window...
body:
mikejohnson opened pull request #847

Add keyboard navigation support

Changes: +342 -18 lines

Adds full keyboard navigation to email list, thread view, and compose window. Includes j/k navigation, e to archive, d to delete, and cmd+k command palette.

View PR: https://github.com/agent-native/core/pull/847

subject: Design System Tokens — Updated Figma file
snippet: Hey! Just pushed the updated token set to Figma. Major changes: new color ramps for dark mode, updated spacing scale from 4px to 8px base...
body:
Hey!

Just pushed the updated token set to Figma. Major changes:

- New color ramps for dark mode (much better contrast ratios)
- Updated spacing scale from 4px to 8px base
- Typography scale now follows a proper modular scale
- Removed all the legacy "legacy-" prefixed tokens

Figma link: https://figma.com/file/design-tokens-v2

Let me know if anything looks off. We should sync before the design review Thursday.

Alex

subject: Re: Partnership opportunity — follow up
snippet: Following up on our conversation last week. We'd love to explore a deeper integration between our platforms. Would you have 30 mins this week?
body:
Hi,

Following up on our conversation last week. We'd love to explore a deeper integration between our platforms.

Would you have 30 mins this week? I'm flexible Thursday afternoon or Friday morning.

Calendly: https://calendly.com/jordan-kim

Best,
Jordan

subject: Issue assigned: ENG-2341 — Fix dark mode flicker on route change
snippet: You have been assigned issue ENG-2341. Priority: High. Due: July 18. Fix dark mode flicker on route change in the main app layout...
body:
You have been assigned issue ENG-2341.

Fix dark mode flicker on route change
Priority: High
Due: July 18
Project: Core App

Description:
Fix dark mode flicker on route change in the main app layout. Repro: navigate between routes with dark mode enabled. Expected: no flicker. Actual: brief white flash visible.

View in Linear: https://linear.app/team/issue/ENG-2341

subject: Team offsites — Dates & location confirmed
snippet: Great news! We've locked in the venue for the team offsite. Dates: Aug 14-16, Lake Tahoe. Please complete the travel survey by July 20th...
body:
Great news!

We've locked in the venue for the team offsite.

Dates: August 14–16
Location: Lake Tahoe, CA
Hotel: Tahoe Mountain Lodge (all rooms covered)

Action items:
- Complete travel survey by July 20: https://forms.company.com/offsite
- Book flights (reimbursable up to $400)
- Pack layers — evenings get cold!

Looking forward to some proper team time. It's been too long!

Maya

subject: Thank you for the open source contribution!
snippet: Just wanted to say thank you for your PR to our project. The keyboard navigation improvements are really polished. We've merged it and...
body:
Hi,

Just wanted to say thank you for your PR to our project. The keyboard navigation improvements are really polished.

We've merged it and will ship it in the next minor release (v2.4). Over 200 stars were added the day we announced it on Twitter.

Would you be interested in becoming a maintainer? We'd love to have your continued involvement.

Chris

subject: Intro: Founder <> Investor — re: Series A
snippet: Hi, I was connected by Mike Torres who thought we should connect. We invest in developer tooling and infrastructure. Would love to learn more...
body:
Hi,

I was connected by Mike Torres who thought we should connect.

We invest in developer tooling and infrastructure at the Series A stage ($3-10M checks). We've backed companies like DevTools Co, BuildFast, and CodeStream.

Would love to learn more about what you're building. Would a 20-minute call work this week or next?

Best,
Lena

Partner, Lena@vc.fund
Portfolio: vc.fund/portfolio

subject: Re: Q3 Product Roadmap — Final Review
snippet: Thanks Sarah! I've left comments on the doc. The onboarding flow timeline looks solid. One question about the analytics dashboard scope...
body:
Thanks Sarah!

I've left comments on the doc. The onboarding flow timeline looks solid.

One question about the analytics dashboard scope — are we including the export feature in August or pushing to Q4? I want to make sure engineering has enough runway.

Also flagging that the mobile app refresh might conflict with the iOS app store review freeze in September. Worth checking with Raj.

Thanks,
Me
